Speedup: 0.006306%                                                                                       \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. As a   \n          consequence, 14.6x the data written to the L2 cache has to be communicated to the L2 Compression unit. Try    \n          maximizing local coherence for the write operations to compressible memory.
